name: GitHub/GitLab + git-cliff/Changie pattern
description: For C and C++, the must-review ecosystem is mostly language-agnostic: git-cliff for commit-derived logs, Changie for fragments, and GitHub/GitLab release tooling for publication.

name: GitHub Automatically Generated Release Notes
description: Built-in GitHub release-note generator based on merged pull requests, contributors, and changelog comparison links.

name: GitLab Changelogs
description: GitLab built-in changelog generation based on commit titles and Git trailers such as Changelog: added/fixed/changed.

name: Keep a Changelog
description: Human-centered changelog format and vocabulary that many tools target or partially implement.

name: changelog-from-release
description: Small CLI that backfills/generates a Markdown changelog from existing GitHub Releases.

name: glab changelog
description: GitLab CLI command that generates changelogs from project commits using GitLab changelog configuration.

name: glab release
description: GitLab CLI release command for creating or updating releases, including using release notes from a file.

name: logchange
description: Tool that stores each change in a separate YAML file to reduce changelog merge conflicts and generate CHANGELOG.md during release.

name: release-cli
description: Deprecated GitLab release command-line tool formerly used by CI release jobs to create releases through the Releases API.

name: GitReleaseManager
description: .NET/GitTools utility for creating draft releases from milestones, attaching assets, publishing drafts, and exporting release notes.

name: GitReleaseNotes
description: GitTools utility for generating release notes from GitHub, Jira, and YouTrack project data.

name: GitVersion
description: Git-based semantic version calculator for .NET and CI pipelines.

name: Nerdbank.GitVersioning
description: Microsoft/dotnet project for stamping assemblies, NuGet packages, VSIX, and other artifacts with Git-derived SemVer information.

name: dotnet-releaser
description: All-in-one .NET release CLI for building, testing, packaging, creating release notes from PRs/commits, publishing to NuGet, and creating GitHub releases.

name: versionize
description: .NET tool for automatic NuGet versioning and CHANGELOG generation from Conventional Commits.

name: Action For Semantic Release
description: Runs semantic-release in a workflow; the common entry point for the semantic-release engine.

name: Add Changelog Entry
description: Programmatically updates a Keep a Changelog 1.0.0 formatted file.

name: Auto-generate CHANGELOG
description: Generates CHANGELOG.md from Conventional Commits; can update a branch or open a PR.

name: Chalogen
description: CHANGELOG.md generator from commits and tags with Conventional Commits support.

name: Changelog Updater
description: Inserts release notes into a changelog file.

name: Changelog Validator
description: Validates that CHANGELOG.md exists and follows Keep a Changelog format.

name: Changelog from Conventional Commits
description: Generates changelog between the latest/previous tag or an explicit tag range.

name: Changeset Github Release
description: Creates GitHub releases from the CHANGELOG.md generated by Changesets.

name: Changesets Action
description: Standard Changesets workflow: version packages, edit changelogs, and publish.

name: Changesets-GH
description: Runs Changesets version/publish; the version command edits changelogs and deletes changesets.

name: ChangesetsDependencies
description: Automates Changeset creation based on dependency changes.

name: ChangesetsSnapshot
description: Snapshot release workflow for Changesets on PRs.

name: Conventional Bump and Changelog
description: Fork/variant of Conventional Changelog Action: bump, tag, and generate changelog.

name: Conventional Changelog Action
description: Bumps version, tags the commit, and generates a changelog from Conventional Commits.

name: Conventional Changelog Reader
description: Reads data from CHANGELOG.md files following Conventional Changelog output.

name: Conventional changelog generator
description: Generates a changelog from conventional commit history for the latest tag.

name: Create release notes from changelog
description: GitHub Action that extracts release notes from CHANGELOG.md, optionally combines a static header, and writes RELEASE.md.

name: Extract Release Notes
description: Extracts release notes from a Keep a Changelog formatted changelog.

name: Generate changelog with git-chglog
description: Uses git-chglog to create CHANGELOG.md from SemVer tags and Conventional Commits.

name: Generic Conventional Changelog
description: Generates a changelog from conventional commits between two refs.

name: Go Changelog Generator
description: Go-based changelog generator; parses Conventional Commits, supports an unreleased section.

name: Keep A Changelog - New Release
description: Promotes [Unreleased] to a versioned section, updates tag links, inserts a new Unreleased.

name: Keep-a-Changelog Action
description: Bump/query operations on Keep a Changelog + SemVer files.

name: Python Semantic Release
description: Python-oriented semantic-release: versioning, changelog, and release workflow.

name: Release Changelog Builder
description: Builds highly customizable release notes / changelog text from GitHub PR and commit data.

name: Release Drafter
description: GitHub Action that keeps a draft release updated as PRs merge, grouping release notes by labels and rules.

name: Release notes generator (milestone)
description: Generates release notes when a milestone is closed.

name: Semantic Release Notes Generator
description: Thin wrapper around semantic-release/release-notes-generator.

name: Tag Changelog
description: On a SemVer tag push, creates changelog text from commits since the previous tag.

name: go-semantic-release
description: Go implementation of semantic-release with optional changelog file output.

name: release-notes-action
description: Generates release notes like GitHub's release publish panel using the GitHub API.

name: release-please
description: Google release automation that parses Conventional Commits, opens release PRs, updates changelogs, bumps versions, and creates GitHub releases.

name: rtf42-conventional-changelog-action
description: Updates a changelog from conventional commits since the latest tag or a tag range.

name: changelog-generator
description: Configurable commit-based changelog generator that groups commits since the previous release.

name: changie
description: Automated changelog tool for projects using conventional commits

name: git-chglog
description: Go-based changelog generator that uses git tags and commits with configurable templates.

name: goreleaser
description: Release automation tool for Go projects including changelog generation

name: com.diffplug.spotless-changelog
description: Gradle plugin that checks Keep a Changelog compliance and can compute release versions from the changelog.

name: git-changelog-maven-plugin
description: Maven plugin that generates changelogs or release notes from a git repository, with issue tracker integration.

name: maven-changelog-plugin
description: Apache Maven plugin that generates SCM change reports for Maven sites, including changelog and activity reports.

name: net.wooga.github-release-notes
description: Gradle plugin providing tasks and conventions for GitHub release-note messages.

name: org.jetbrains.changelog
description: JetBrains Gradle plugin with tasks and helpers for working with Keep a Changelog style changelogs.

name: @changesets/changelog-github
description: Changesets changelog generator that links changelog entries to GitHub commits, PRs, and users.

name: @semantic-release/release-notes-generator
description: semantic-release plugin that generates release note content with conventional-changelog.

name: Changesets
description: File-based release intent workflow for packages and monorepos; contributors add changeset files that drive version bumps, changelogs, and publishing.

name: auto-changelog
description: Command-line tool that generates changelogs from git tags and commit history.

name: changelogithub
description: CLI for generating GitHub release changelogs from Conventional Commits, powered by changelogen.

name: commit-and-tag-version
description: Drop-in replacement style tool for npm version workflows with automated bumping, tagging, and changelog generation.

name: conventional-changelog
description: Core Node ecosystem changelog toolkit for generating changelogs and release notes from commit metadata.

name: conventional-changelog-cli
description: Generate changelogs from conventional commits

name: github-release-from-changelog
description: CLI that extracts the relevant changelog section and creates/updates a GitHub Release for a tag.

name: keep-a-changelog
description: Node/Deno library for parsing and generating Keep a Changelog formatted changelog files.

name: release-it
description: Generic CLI tool to automate versioning and package publishing

name: semantic-release
description: Fully automated version management and package publishing

name: standard-version
description: Automate versioning and CHANGELOG generation with semver and conventional commits

name: keepachangelog
description: Python library/CLI for parsing, generating, and releasing Keep a Changelog style changelog files.

name: keepachangelog-manager-fork
description: Keep a Changelog workflow CLI with task staging, fragments, backfill, validation/autofix, release automation, and GUI support.

name: python-kacl
description: Python library/CLI for verifying, editing, and releasing Keep a Changelog files, with fragment and link-generation support.

name: reno
description: OpenStack release-notes manager that stores note files and associates them with releases based on git tags.

name: scriv
description: Changelog management CLI that creates and aggregates changelog fragments into a project changelog.

name: towncrier
description: Building newsfiles for your project via news fragments

name: github_changelog_generator
description: Ruby CLI/gem that generates CHANGELOG.md from GitHub tags, issues, labels, and merged pull requests.

name: cargo-dist
description: Rust release distribution tool that generates CI and publishes artifacts/installers to GitHub Releases; often paired with changelog generators.

name: cargo-release
description: Cargo subcommand for crate release automation; commonly combined with git-cliff or cargo-dist for changelog/release pipelines.

name: cargo-smart-release
description: Cargo subcommand for smarter Rust workspace releases, including changelog scaffolding and release simulation.

name: changelog-rs
description: Changelog management tool in Rust

name: git-cliff
description: Highly customizable changelog generator from git history

name: release-plz
description: Rust crate release automation that updates changelogs with git-cliff, bumps Cargo.toml versions, publishes crates, and creates releases.
